      "finding_id": "taxonomy-scope-preserved",
      "severity": "note",
      "category": "taxonomy_mapping",
      "claim_or_issue": "The candidate scope is cellular_senescence and senolytics, and the proposed study, outcome, result, and finding records remain mapped to dasatinib-quercetin where intervention taxonomy is expected.",
      "why_it_matters": "The provenance repair should not introduce a different hallmark, track, or intervention taxonomy while attaching PubMed snapshot provenance.",
      "recommended_action": "No change needed; keep the existing cellular_senescence, senolytics, and dasatinib-quercetin taxonomy assignments.",
      "resolution_status": "closed"
    },
    {
      "finding_id": "taxonomy-endpoint-boundaries-consistent",
      "severity": "note",
      "category": "taxonomy_mapping",
      "claim_or_issue": "Endpoint categorization remains consistent across the three sources: DKD records are biomarker-focused, IPF records are safety/feasibility or other trial-conduct focused, and the AD-risk records are functional with biomarker context.",
      "why_it_matters": "Endpoint categories determine whether evidence is routed as biomarker, functional, safety, or trial-conduct evidence rather than being overgeneralized.",
      "recommended_action": "No change needed; preserve the current endpoint categories and source-study-outcome-result-finding linkages.",
      "resolution_status": "closed"
    },
    {
      "finding_id": "taxonomy-source-snapshot-links-non-disruptive",
      "severity": "note",
      "category": "taxonomy_mapping",
      "claim_or_issue": "The three new source_snapshot records map one-to-one to PMIDs 31542391, 36857968, and 40010154, and the provenance additions do not add or remove taxonomy-bearing fields.",
      "why_it_matters": "Snapshot provenance should improve source traceability without changing how evidence is classified in the longevity taxonomy.",
      "recommended_action": "No change needed; use the PubMed EFetch snapshots as provenance anchors only.",
      "resolution_status": "closed"
    }
  ]
}
